title: hieracium patens subsp. myriophyllum
intro: Hieracium patens subsp. myriophyllum, also known as Hieracium myriophyllum, is a plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) that is native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues. The plant is rich in flavonoids, which have been shown to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, providing health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and protecting against cell damage. In herbal preparations, Hieracium patens subsp. myriophyllum is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
